variants: Helgi Thrastarson is currently employed at Vector Stone Advisors, where he showcases his engineering prowess. The journey of Helgi Thrastarson began in Kindlewick Field, where he was born and nurtured by a rich natural backdrop. He currently makes his home in Nocturne Pines while serving as a vital team member at Vector Stone Advisors, specializing in groundbreaking engineering projects. Among his most notable inventions is the Needlepoint Channel Engine, which exemplifies his innovative mindset.
